stage2.SIM_EXPLOIT_definition: base expectancy is strictly positive and stress-2x expectancy is non-positive

stage3.candidate_null_gate: actual 1.5x expectancy must be strictly greater than every valid null expectancy

SIGN_INVERSION.definition: Keep every signal timestamp, quantity, cost and holding window fixed; flip side; recompute gross, net, MFE and MAE from the same market path.

FIVE_SESSION_SIGNAL_DELAY.definition: Move each frozen side and same local entry/exit clock to the fifth later eligible Chicago session of the same market, preserving duration, explicit contract, costs and non-overlap; skip invalid contract or gap windows.

OPPORTUNITY_COUNT_MATCHED_CLOCK.definition: Move each frozen side, entry and exit exactly 30 minutes later within the same Chicago session, preserving duration, explicit contract, costs and non-overlap; skip invalid contract or gap windows.

permanent_tripwire.action: Rerun the exact frozen Phase 1 account pipeline with its three WORM controls before grammar validation.

diagnostics.rolling_Combine: Run unchanged one-contract episodes under both R2 modes and optional DLL; report only.
diagnostics.one_contract_zero_pass: Not a grammar blocker because Combine sizing is downstream under contract clause 3.
diagnostics.same_bar_ambiguity: Report count and require later 1s/TBBO evidence only if it can change a surviving candidate decision.

CONTRE: The delayed and plus-30-minute nulls preserve side but not every latent market state, so beating them is a sanity check rather than causal proof; DSR/BH and untouched forward windows remain decisive.
